query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: A black and white portrait of a woman with bangs and shoulder-length hair, shown in three-quarter profile facing right with bare shoulders visible. The background is dark and indistinct.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily textured black and white portrait of a woman with bangs and shoulder-length hair, shown in three-quarter profile facing right with bare shoulders visible, rendered with prominent analog film grain that creates a coarse, organic surface across the entire image. The background is dark and indistinct, with flat, low-contrast lighting that collapses depth into a muted, oppressive atmosphere where shadows and midtones blend with weak tonal separation.
